name: Marcus Persaud-Morrison
voice_prompt: Perfect audio quality. Young man, late twenties, Brooklyn-born with Jamaican-American father and Indo-Trinidadian mother. Contemporary urban American voice with occasional Caribbean rhythms inherited from family speech patterns. Warm, curious, slightly earnest. A voice searching for something. Medium-low pitch, moderate pace. The sound of someone learning to claim an identity he was born into but never fully taught.
notes: Third-generation voice. The yearning for heritage is audible—he speaks carefully around his grandmother, trying to absorb her rhythms. With his generation, he's more casual, more contemporary.
